title: descurainia menziesii var. ochroleuca
intro: Descurainia menziesii var. ochroleuca, also known as Western yellow rocket, is a plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae) and is native to the western regions of North America. This plant contains compounds with potential medicinal properties, including isothiocyanates, which have been studied for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Western yellow rocket include its ability to support immune function and may help protect against certain types of cancer. Western yellow rocket can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
